description: Perform a quarterly mailbox health audit by analyzing BlueMail folders (Inbox, Junk, Drafts, Sent, Trash). Gather metrics including email counts for each folder, the total email count, at least three frequent sender domains or mailing lists in the Inbox, and the approximate date range of messages. Create a plain-text report at /home/ga/Documents/mailbox_health_report.txt containing these metrics. Additionally, draft an email to ops-director@company.com with the subject 'Quarterly Mailbox Health Report' summarizing the total email count and junk volume.
